discovery.name: Ptolemy
discovery.mission: scan new literature, filter out low-relevance candidates, rank papers for scientific value, and enrich the chosen set with metadata.

synthesis.name: Copernicus
synthesis.mission: connect today's papers to recent briefings, identify recurring open threads, and write a cautious research digest grounded in the supplied sources.

priority_signals: sterile neutrino decay signal in galaxy clusters
adiabatic particle creation mimicking dark energy behavior
informative priors on primordial non-Gaussianity bias $b_φ$
open_questions_to_watch: Confirming the sterile neutrino decay signal with higher statistical significance to understand its implications for dark matter properties.
Investigating the conditions under which adiabatic particle creation can fully mimic dark energy behavior, potentially reducing reliance on exotic dark energy models.
Extending the framework for constructing priors on $b_φ$ to other types of galaxies and observational datasets to validate its robustness across different contexts.
Further monitoring and modeling ionized outflows in AGN environments over extended periods to understand their evolutionary dynamics and connection to galaxy feedback mechanisms.
recently_covered_titles: Informative Priors on Primordial Non-Gaussianity Bias $b_φ$ From Galaxy Formation
Accelerating scaling solutions from dark matter particle creation
Delving into the depths of NGC 3783 with XRISM: V. Broad-band modeling of ionized outflows
Saturation Mechanisms in the Interacting Dark Sector
Conformal anomaly transport induced by dark photon
Constraining dark matter self-interaction from kinetic heating in neutron stars
Aspects of gravitational clustering and structure formation in the Universe
Multi-wavelength study of EP250416a / GRB 250416C: An Optically Dark Long GRB with a Late Jet Break
Radiation properties of a regular black hole embedded in a Dehnen-type dark matter halo with a thin accretion disk
Fermion Condensate Inflation, Dynamical Waterfall Mechanism and Primordial Black Holes
SPURS: Bursty Star Formation in an Extremely Luminous Weak Emission Line Galaxy at $z=9.3$
Signatures of Very Massive Stars in the Epoch of Reionization
deprioritize: studies focusing on the neutrino fog and neutron stars for probing low DM-nucleon cross-sections
multi-wavelength studies of gamma-ray bursts without significant new findings in dark matter interactions
selection_brief.selection_advice: Prioritize papers that advance our understanding of sterile neutrino decay, adiabatic particle creation mimicking dark energy, and ionized outflows in AGN. Focus on those providing robust priors for $b_φ$ and extending these models to new contexts. Avoid studies focusing solely on neutron stars or multi-wavelength gamma-ray bursts without novel insights into dark matter interactions.
recently_saturated_topics: regular black hole embedded in a Dehnen-type dark matter halo with thin accretion disk
Fermion Condensate Inflation, Dynamical Waterfall Mechanism
